title: Sphaerosacme decandra
intro: Sphaerosacme decandra, also known as the five-angled sphaerosacme, is a plant species belonging to the family Sphenocactaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its various health benefits, including treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Sphaerosacme decandra include alkaloids, saponins, and flavonoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant is commonly used to make herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
taxonomy: Sphaerosacme decandra is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. It belongs to the genus Sphaerosacme, which is a group of flowering plants.
